title: Enzonic Currency
body:
# Enzonic currency is a brand new banking mod.
- It adds an ATM with features to insert/cashout e-coins (the main currency)
- It also adds a coin printer to make the e-coins and recepies for all the items
- There is a baking villager for you to be able to buy items from the mod without crafting
- Did i mention there is a wallet for storing your coins???

## As for now, Enzonic Currency adds the following:
- E-Coins
- Financial music disc
- Coin machine
- Wallet
- Money Printer
- Banker villager proffesion
